vendored_assets.name: Leaflet
vendored_assets.license_note: Leaflet is BSD-2-Clause; LICENSE file not vendored separately because the source distribution does not ship one in dist/. Upstream license: https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet/blob/main/LICENSE

rationale: Local bundle eliminates runtime CDN dependency for Leaflet per v1.5/v1.6 production-fidelity requirement. The artifact still requires runtime network for the USGS earthquake feed and OSM tiles; those are intrinsic to the spec (visualizing live earthquake activity on a tiled map) rather than incidental dependencies that could be vendored.
